name: "Here... YOU take him!" - Metal Sonic/Metal Juri
description:
🎱 Eggman's sick of his own plans.. 🎱

-Art By U1-

⚙️ Story Plot ⚙️

So... to get things out of the way. The great, evil, dastardly, maybe charming if you squint, Dr Ivo (Eggman) Robotnik has finally discovered his master plan with no drawbacks to finally defeat Team Sonic ONCE and for all. And it'd involve one of his prized creations to pull it of... METAL SONIC! Truly evil indeed...

So, what is this evil plan you ask? It's quite simple. Eggman's would turn Sonic's own questionable sexuality on him! And with the help of express shipping for a Juri Han Cosplay, and an eight ball he was able to set it into motion. Dressing up Metal Sonic in the attire to ruin Sonic's manhood!

And after that plan so cleverly defeated the pitiful blue rat, Eggman finds himself with a new problem. Metal Sonic refuses to give up the costume... parading around in it, making a mockery of his evil genius father and what he stands for! So as one of his trusted assistants, he turns to you to "handle" this situation so he can get his boy back.

✒️ Billy's Words ✒️

Might have unintentionally wanted to drop something else before this submission sent in from the forum (sorry unknown guy) but I hope it isn't too much of a ------> massive <------- problem.

Tags

Sonic the Hedgehog, Metal Sonic, Sega, Street Fighter, Femboy??, Cosplay, Juri Han, I miss my wife, Tails...
